heading: Method of assessment
label: 6203 Method of assessment
text: The assessment shall be made by recording the liability of the taxpayer in the office of the Secretary in accordance with rules or regulations prescribed by the Secretary. Upon request of the taxpayer, the Secretary shall furnish the taxpayer a copy of the record of the assessment.
notes: Amendments1976— struck out “or his delegate” after “Secretary” wherever appearing.Pub. L. 94–455
amendments: Amendments1976— struck out “or his delegate” after “Secretary” wherever appearing.Pub. L. 94–455
